canto_title: The Descent into the Second Bolgia and the Prophecy of Vanni Fucci

scenes.summary: A peasant observes the frost and prepares to tend his sheep.
Virgil helps Dante navigate a difficult and rocky terrain.
Virgil provides practical advice on how to navigate the slope.
The poets navigate an increasingly steep and exhausting path.
Virgil encourages Dante to overcome his physical fatigue through willpower.
An unidentified voice speaks aggressively from a nearby ditch.
The poets descend to the edge of the second pit.
A terrifying abundance of snakes is described within the pit.
A snake strikes a sinner, who is consumed and reborn like a phoenix.
The text describes the profound, human suffering of the fallen man.
The sinner reveals his name and his origins in Pistoia.
The sinner admits to his crime of sacrilegious theft.
The sinner predicts upcoming political violence and upheaval in Tuscany.
